opportunity.title: Seeking Media-Savvy Professional
opportunity.summary: Our client seeks a media-savvy professional who can effectively drive brand growth in the U.S. through innovative PR and media strategies tailored to small budgets.
opportunity.description:
Summary:

A global beauty brand is seeking to significantly boost consumer demand and brand awareness in the highly competitive U.S. market while working within a limited budget of $5 to $10 million (inclusive of agency fees and production costs). Their current challenges include:


  • Ineffective Media Strategies: Previous media plans have been fragmented and overly reliant on standard agency approaches that lack disruptive impact, resulting in minimal brand growth.
  • Market Saturation: The U.S. beauty market is highly saturated, making it difficult for brands with smaller budgets to stand out using traditional methods.
  • Fragmented Digital Spend: Investments spread thinly across multiple digital platforms (YouTube, Meta, TikTok) have diluted their impact, preventing substantial consumer engagement.
  • Need for Consumer Pull: With distribution channels optimized, the next critical step is creating strong consumer demand and brand loyalty.
  • Lack of U.S.-Specific Expertise: They have a solid global brand strategy and existing marketing assets but lack tailored expertise for the U.S. market to effectively deploy these resources.

To overcome these challenges, they are looking for a candidate who:


  • Has Strong PR Connections in the U.S.: Someone well-connected within the U.S. PR landscape, capable of leveraging relationships to maximize brand exposure and media coverage.
  • Experience with Small Budgets: Proven track record of growing beauty brands on limited budgets by utilizing creative, cost-effective strategies that deliver high impact.
  • Expertise in Digital and Traditional Media: Knowledgeable in both digital channels (YouTube, Meta, TikTok) and traditional media (audio, radio, podcasts) to reach and engage the target audience effectively.
  • Creative and Scrappy Approach: Ability to think outside the box, take calculated risks, and implement innovative tactics that cut through market saturation and resonate with consumers.
  • Focus on Efficient Media Use: Skilled in strategically curating and deploying existing marketing assets to maximize impact without additional production costs, avoiding the dilution of efforts across too many platforms.
  • Understanding of the U.S. Market: Deep experience with the U.S. consumer landscape to advise on the most effective channels and methods for creating strong consumer pull.
  • Ability to Strongly Advise on Media Strategy: Capable of providing robust guidance on where to invest for maximum impact, moving away from an over-reliance on standard media agency plans that may lack disruptive qualities.
  • Preferably Located in Eastern or Central Time Zone: Ideally based in the Eastern or Central U.S. to facilitate seamless collaboration and interaction with the team.

Overall, they seek a media-savvy professional who can effectively drive brand growth in the U.S. through innovative PR and media strategies tailored to small budgets. This individual will play a crucial role in overcoming current challenges by crafting and executing a focused, impactful media plan that elevates brand awareness, generates consumer demand, and sets the brand apart in a crowded market

opportunity.title: Tradeshow LED Wall Video
opportunity.summary: Our client's booth has a large, 2-sided 'L' shaped LED video wall for next year's NADA show, and we are seeking a partner to conceive and produce the video assets.
opportunity.description:
LED Wall Video for Conference Booth

Partner Brief.

 

1. Project Overview

Model B, as the lead creative agency, is seeking a video production partner experienced in motion design to concept and produce a looping video for our client’s booth at a major trade convention. The video will be a centerpiece of the booth, attracting attendees from across the exhibition hall and sparking their interest in stopping by.

 

2. Background

Upstart is a leading fintech company and a pioneer in AI-powered lending solutions. Their Auto Retail division focuses on helping car dealerships modernize auto financing. By combining advanced data science with deep industry expertise, Upstart delivers faster funding and higher approval rates than traditional lenders, and a seamless financing experience for both dealers and consumers.

The NADA Show (National Automobile Dealers Association) is one of the largest and most influential automotive trade shows in the U.S., attracting thousands of dealers, finance professionals, and industry leaders from across the country. It serves as a high-profile platform for companies like Upstart to showcase innovation, thought leadership, and market-leading products.

At NADA 2026, Upstart’s booth is strategically located near a main entrance and is designed to be highly visually engaging to capture attention, even if sightlines are partially blocked by nearby exhibitors. The LED “L”-shaped wall is a key feature - it towers over the booth, and is intended to serve as a bold, immersive, and conversation-starting centerpiece.



Front of booth - 3D mock-up. The LED wall is just above the reception area in an “L” shape (note that the colors, wall wrapping design etc. are not final). The structure is made to tower over the booth so that it’s visible even if sightlines are partially blocked by nearby exhibitors.

 



Back of booth - 3D mock-up

 



Floor plan

 

3. Creative Requirements

●     The LED wall video should run continuously, with two levels of visual engagement:

○     Passive / Background Mode: Subtle, looping motion that ensures the screen is always “alive” (e.g., shifting colors, scrolling logos, soft gradients).

○     Attention-Grabbing Moments: Periodic bursts of high-impact animation designed to attract attention from afar (“Las Vegas Pop”). These may include strobe effects, bold motion sequences, or a dramatic 3D-effect animation that creates depth and jumps off the screen (e.g. 3D billboards).

●     Ultimately, the video should help to capture attention from afar in the exhibition hall. The LED wall needs to attract eyeballs and draw people towards Upstart’s booth.

 

4. Core Deliverables

●     Concept development and storyboarding

●     Animation design and production (including 3D effects as appropriate)

●     Loop-ready video files optimized for playback on the booth’s LED wall

 

5. Budget

The client’s budget is $30,000–$60,000, but they are open to considering a higher price for more elaborate, impactful production.

Please provide two creative/pricing options:

●     “Simple” Option: Leaner animation with simple looping background plus a few bold moments.

●     “Complex” Option: More elaborate production with stronger 3D animation and high-impact sequences, and higher “wow factor”.

 

6.Tentative Timeline

Deadline for responses: October 10, 2025

Partner appointment: October 17, 2025

Kickoff: Week of October 20, 2025

Final delivery: January 16, 2026

 

7. Response Requested

We look forward to receiving your response with the following items:

●     Initial cost estimate for both simple and complex options, including information about the included work (e.g., loop length, complexity)

●     Proposed project timeline

●     Relevant examples of prior work, especially 2D/3D animation, trade shows, or large-format installations.

The Guadalupe-Blanco River Authority (GBRA) is requesting proposals under RFP #2025-018 for a two-phase website redesign and implementation project. The primary goal is to modernize the public-facing website and later rebuild the employee intranet.

Data Analyst - Existing Client - Augment Agency Team - 20 Hours Per Week


Data & Analytics at Agency

At Agency, data is our oxygen. Our team turns data into insights, actions and outcomes across the agency. Data fuels creativity and continuous improvement. Our mission is to build smarter strategies, activations and experiences through data and foster a thriving data culture.

Role in a Nutshell

Called “The Reporter,” the Analyst understands core marketing sources, platforms and data collection. They produce descriptive analytics, investigate performance trends with Sr. Analysts and Associate Directors, and act as the go‑to person for reports across their client portfolio.

Responsibilities

  • Compile performance reports for assigned clients.
  • Assist Sr. Analyst and Associate Director with diagnostic analysis.
  • Ensure quality of business‑ready data with the Associate Analyst.
  • Develop dashboards using Tableau, Looker Data Studio or Power BI.
  • Maintain dashboards for quality and improvements.
  • Provide weekly campaign summaries via email or during meetings.
  • Use Agency’s data lakehouse for ad‑hoc analysis and troubleshooting.
  • Work with Media Specialists and Planners to gather media data requirements.
  • Contribute to measurement plans and document KPIs and optimization metrics.
  • Help develop tagging plans for campaign activations.

Qualifications

  • 2–3 years’ experience in marketing/advertising, ad tech or data operations.
  • Degree in Business, Marketing, Computer Science, Mathematics or Statistics preferred (or equivalent experience).
  • Collaborative team experience.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills.
  • Familiarity with SQL and database concepts.
  • Curiosity, problem‑solving and critical thinking.
  • Ability to present statistics to small groups.

opportunity.title: IDFG Public Website Redesign & Development Project
opportunity.summary: Redesign and develop IDFG’s public website with ADA compliance, a scalable CMS, enhanced security, and high uptime for high-traffic events.
opportunity.description:
Proposal Deadline: August 6, 2025, at 7:00 AM Mountain Time.


Proposals must be submitted electronically through IPRO, with all required documents to be considered responsive. Vendors must attend to all (M) and (ME) requirements in the RFP and provide a redacted version if any trade secrets are included. Failure to meet these instructions may result in disqualification. The cost proposal must be submitted as a separate document.


The Idaho Department of Fish and Game (IDFG), through the Division of Purchasing, seeks a qualified vendor to design, test, architect, and develop a new public-facing website to replace its outdated infrastructure at https://idfg.idaho.gov/. The redesigned site must improve usability, accessibility (ADA/WCAG 2.1 AA), security, and performance, particularly during high-traffic periods aligned with Idaho’s hunting and fishing license and tag sales.


The successful offeror will deliver a modern, scalable website using a user-friendly CMS that supports mobile responsiveness, search engine optimization (SEO), real-time analytics, and integration with internal systems and third-party data sources. Development must include content audit, migration, design system creation, DevOps pipeline, automated testing, robust backend architecture, and stakeholder training.


Offerors must demonstrate a minimum of 7 years’ experience in large-scale web development and show prior success in complete website rebuilds. A strong security plan, post-launch support model, and compliance with Idaho’s data protection and system security standards are required. Proposals must address technical scope, UI/UX strategy, ongoing support, and uptime expectations tied to seasonal events noted in Attachment 8.

opportunity.title: Salesforce CRM Implementation
opportunity.summary: Implement and configure Salesforce CRM for Hawaii DOT-A to enhance communication, case management, and stakeholder interaction across multiple airport divisions statewide.
opportunity.description:
Pre-Proposal Conference: June 25, 2025, at 10:00 am PDT

Questions and Request for Clarification (RFCs): June 27, 2025, at 4:00 PM PDT

Proposal Due: July 23, 2025, at 2:00 PM PDT

______________________________________________________________________

The State of Hawaii, Department of Transportation, Airports Division (DOTA) is seeking a qualified contractor to provide comprehensive Salesforce CRM implementation services. The goal is to deploy a cloud-based system that enables internal and external stakeholders to communicate and collaborate efficiently through a secure, centralized platform. The contractor will design, configure, and support a CRM solution that accommodates DOTA’s diverse operational needs across its 15 commercial and general aviation airports.


The CRM must support case tracking, document sharing, stakeholder engagement, reporting, and analytics, with a user interface optimized for both desktop and mobile access. Key functional areas include public inquiries, permit and license applications, noise complaints, and tenant communications. The solution should integrate with existing systems, support process automation, and ensure data privacy compliance.


The project will follow a phased approach, beginning with discovery and system design, followed by development, testing, training, and full rollout. Deliverables include a detailed implementation roadmap, stakeholder input sessions, data migration plans, customized dashboards, and comprehensive training for administrators and end-users.


The awarded vendor must have demonstrated experience with Salesforce Government Cloud implementations, particularly for transportation or public sector clients. The proposed solution must remain cost-effective, scalable, and maintainable by internal DOTA resources post-launch.

opportunity.title: eCommerce Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist
opportunity.summary: Need seasoned e-commerce CRO Specialist for part-time, remote, contract role. Mid- to senior-level, deep experience in e-commerce performance, Shopify, higher-end beauty or home decor brands is ideal.
opportunity.description:
eCommerce Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist (Remote, Contractor)

Shopify Site, Consumer Packaged Goods

We are seeking a seasoned e-commerce CRO Specialist to join our client’s team on a remote, contract/fractional basis. This role is ideal for a mid- to senior-level professional with deep experience in data-driven conversion optimization for e-commerce websites. You will lead efforts to improve conversion funnels on their Shopify site—auditing the site and recommending and analyzing best practice changes and tests, optimizing user journeys, and increasing key metrics like site conversion rate, new subscriber (or membership) growth, and average order value (AOV). The CRO Specialist will not write code, but must understand web technologies and work closely with IT/development and creative teams to implement experiments. This role requires a methodical, analytical mindset, strong familiarity with tools (GA4, Hotjar, Optimizely, Intelligen, Rebuy, etc.), AI-forward thinking and experience, and the ability to translate data into actionable website improvements.

Key Responsibilities


  • Develop and execute CRO strategies: Create a testing and optimization roadmap for the Shopify store. Formulate hypotheses to improve product page funnels, checkout flow, landing pages, and onsite personalization.
  • Conduct data analysis: Use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and similar analytics platforms to identify drop-off points in the user journey. Analyze traffic, behavior, and conversion data to uncover friction and prioritize changes and tests.
  • Design and run tests: Plan, set up, and manage A/B and multivariate tests using tools like Optimizely, Intelligen, etc. Define clear test variations (copy, layout, CTAs) and segments, and statistically validate winning versions.
  • Leverage user behavior tools: Utilize heatmaps, session recordings, surveys or equivalent to gain qualitative insights on user interaction and pain points. This complements analytics data and guides design improvements.
  • Implement personalization and upsells: Work with AI driven personalization tools and upsell tools like Rebuy to tailor product recommendations, cross-sells, and promotions. Use customer data to increase AOV and engagement.
  • Collaborate with teams: Partner closely with Creative (designers, copywriters, UX experts) to create compelling test variants and with IT/Development to ensure test code, analytics tracking, and any front-end changes are implemented correctly. Maintain clear communication of goals and results to stakeholders.
  • Monitor and report KPIs: Track and report on CRO performance metrics. Focus on key e-commerce KPIs – conversion rate (visitors→buyers) and AOV – as well as any subscription or membership sign-up growth. Present data-driven findings and recommendations to improve those metrics.
  • Document and iterate: Keep detailed documentation of test plans, results, and learnings. Use insights to refine hypotheses and continuously improve the optimization program. Stay current on CRO and personalization best practices (e.g. leveraging AI or new Shopify features) and share knowledge with the team.

Required Skills & Experience


  • E-commerce/CRO background: Typically 5–7+ years of experience in conversion rate optimization, digital analytics, customer acquisition or related roles, in e-commerce for consumer packaged goods—ideally higher-end beauty, wellness, fragrance and/or home decor.
  • Shopify expertise: Hands-on familiarity with the Shopify platform (themes, Liquid templates, Shopify Analytics, Sidekick, etc). Able to propose optimizations within Shopify’s ecosystem and use Shopify data/dashboarding.
  • Analytics proficiency: Expert use of Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and/or similar analytics tools. Comfortable setting up goals/events, segmenting audiences, and interpreting.
  • User behavior tools: Experience with heatmaps, recordings, surveys to analyze user behavior. Ability to glean insights from qualitative data.
  • A/B testing tools: Proficiency with at least one enterprise testing platform (e.g. Optimizely, Intelligen, VWO, Google Optimize alternatives) to design and implement experiments. Knows best practices for statistical significance and test duration.
  • Personalization/AI/Upsell tools: Experience with Shopify personalization/upsell tools and general AI-driven recommendation engines. Understanding of how to configure and test dynamic content for conversions.
  • Technical understanding: While this role does not require coding, a basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript is important for effective communication.
  • Analytical mindset: Strong quantitative skills and comfort with data analysis/statistics. You use data (not just intuition) to drive decisions and can structure hypotheses and tests rigorously.
  • Brand/UX/Customer focus: Solid grasp of client’s brand principles, copy and image best practices, UX principles, and customer psychology. Ability to “put yourself in the customer’s shoes” to understand user needs and pain points. Ideally experience with higher-end brands.
  • Communication & collaboration: Excellent written and verbal communication. You must articulate test plans, insights, and recommendations clearly to non-technical stakeholders and collaborate effectively with creative and IT teams.
  • Proactive and up-to-date: Keep abreast of the latest CRO strategies, e-commerce trends, and AI-personalization techniques. Be willing to experiment with new approaches and continuously learn (e.g. Shopify Academy resources, industry blogs).

opportunity.title: RFI - 911 AI TO IDENTIFY SWATTING CALLS
opportunity.summary: An AI-driven system to detect indicators of swatting in 911 calls, alerting dispatchers in real-time to help prevent dangerous false emergency responses.
opportunity.description:
Response Due: October 2, 2025


The City of Scottsdale is exploring the development of an AI-driven system to identify swatting calls placed to 911 and non-emergency lines. Swatting involves making false emergency calls intended to trigger a significant police response, often putting both the public and law enforcement personnel at risk. With swatting incidents increasing over 300% in recent years, the city is seeking to collaborate with vendors who can design AI technology capable of detecting common swatting patterns during live 911 calls.


The envisioned solution would analyze real-time audible and metadata cues in calls to alert dispatchers when a call potentially matches swatting characteristics. This alert system would not prevent a response, but would offer law enforcement more context before arriving on the scene. Vendors selected to move forward would be given audio files from actual swatting cases to research and test the AI’s effectiveness. Integration with the city’s 911 communications infrastructure is expected.


While no award is guaranteed from the RFI, the responses may influence the development of a future Request for Proposal (RFP). The city is open to virtual deployments that meet CJIS compliance, FedRAMP equivalence, U.S. data residency, and Arizona’s public records requirements. A prototype or pilot must be able to function with both real-time calls and simulations, delivering timely alerts, ideally before dispatch occurs. The goal is to reduce risk, save time, and improve situational awareness through automated detection tools that evolve toward full integration in the future.

It must align with the goals of Port Houston’s Workforce Planning and Engagement initiative, which focuses on cultivating a regional talent pipeline through training programs, apprenticeships, and industry-academic collaboration.


The site will support outreach efforts by consolidating information from various stakeholders, including academic institutions, industry partners, and community organizations involved in maritime workforce development. It should highlight career pathways, educational opportunities, and the economic impact of maritime trade in the region.


The project is federally funded under the EPA’s Clean Ports Program (CFDA No. 66.051) and has a not-to-exceed budget of $150,000. The selected firm will be responsible for all design, development, content migration, and launch-related services, as outlined in Exhibit A – Scope of Services. Attention to user experience, mobile accessibility, and branding consistent with PHPME’s identity is critical.


Deliverables include full integration with Neon One CMS, stakeholder input sessions, compliance with ADA accessibility standards, and a final deployment plan. The consultant will also provide training to designated Port staff for ongoing updates and maintenance.

opportunity.title: Web Design & Development
opportunity.summary: Design, develop, and host a new public website and secure staff intranet for the City of Wyoming, MI, including content migration, CMS training, and integration with third-party systems.
opportunity.description:
Bid Due: July 8, 2025, 11 am, local time


The City of Wyoming, Michigan, is seeking a qualified vendor to design, develop, implement, and host a new public-facing website and secure internal intranet platform. This project aims to improve digital services for residents, businesses, and visitors, while enhancing internal communication and operations among city staff.


The new website must be responsive, mobile-friendly, ADA/WCAG compliant, and built with a user-friendly CMS that allows staff to manage content efficiently. It should support content subscriptions, calendar events, online forms, and integration with third-party tools such as bill payment, inspections, facility rentals, and registration systems. The platform must include a searchable document repository, a news feed, a department directory, and support for media content.


The intranet will serve as a secure, role-based internal system for staff collaboration, file sharing, document workflows, department-specific pages, calendars, and internal news. Integration with Microsoft 365, HRIS, and ERP systems is required, along with support for mobile devices and multiple languages.


The selected vendor will be responsible for:



  • Creative and UI/UX design aligned with City branding
  • Content migration and setup of module-based content
  • Development and testing of both platforms
  • Training City staff and providing documentation
  • Hosting support or recommending a compliant hosting solution


The vendor must ensure a smooth transition from the existing systems, coordinate a soft launch, and offer ongoing support. Hosting services should include high availability, security, backup, and 24/7 emergency response.


This project supports the City’s goal of delivering improved public services and internal engagement through a modern, scalable, and secure digital presence.

opportunity.title: RFP: South Dakota Website Development
opportunity.summary: Redesign and maintain dlr.sd.gov with modern UX/UI, SEO, mobile optimization, CMS, social media integration, security compliance, and analytics reporting.

The South Dakota Department of Labor and Regulation (DLR) seeks one experienced agency to redesign and maintain dlr.sd.gov, creating a modern, responsive, and intuitive site for easy access to business resources. Work includes evaluating the current site’s design, navigation, usability, and functionality, then applying best practices in UX/UI, SEO, and mobile optimization.

opportunity.title: Workflow Automation (n8n + CRM Personalization Engine)
opportunity.summary: Seeking an AI centric automatoin and CRM expert firm.
opportunity.description:
We’re looking for a workflow automation consulting team with deep experience in n8n to help design and implement an end-to-end personalization engine integrated with either HubSpot or Salesforce.


This is not a one-off automation task. This is a systems-level engagement focused on designing how data, logic, and orchestration work together to power scalable, rules-driven personalization across the customer lifecycle.


The right partner understands how to architect automation that is flexible, observable, and resilient, not just technically functional.


The engagement will likely include:


Discovery & System Design

  • Audit of existing data sources, CRM configuration, and automation tooling
  • Definition of personalization goals, signals, and decision logic
  • Architecture design for n8n workflows, data flows, and integrations

Workflow Architecture & Build

  • Design and build modular n8n workflows that support:
  • Event-driven and scheduled execution
  • Conditional logic and branching
  • Error handling, retries, and observability
  • CRM integration with HubSpot or Salesforce, including:
  • Object mapping and data synchronization
  • Triggering downstream actions based on personalization logic

Personalization Engine Design

  • Definition of rules, scoring models, or logic frameworks used to personalize outcomes
  • Clear separation between data ingestion, decisioning, and execution layers
  • Documentation that enables internal teams to understand and extend the system

Handoff & Enablement

  • Technical documentation of workflows and architecture
  • Knowledge transfer to internal operators or future partners
  • Recommendations for iteration, scaling, and governance

The City University of New York (CUNY) is soliciting proposals for the development of custom generative AI chatbots to support its Office of Applied Research, Evaluation, and Data Analytics (OAREDA). The initiative requires three AI chatbots: (1) an external-facing chatbot to answer questions from the public using CUNY’s dashboards and publicly available reports; (2) an internal-facing chatbot to provide research analysts with quick access to technical documentation and data resources; and (3) a dual-facing chatbot that functions as an interactive intake form to streamline information requests and improve OAREDA’s operational efficiency. Vendors must also deliver a report advising CUNY leadership on future AI strategies and data applications.


The contractor will conduct discovery, design, testing, and implementation while ensuring accessibility, responsiveness, and security across devices and browsers. User Acceptance Testing (UAT) with CUNY staff is required to validate performance and usability. Knowledge transfer and training must be provided through sessions and updated documentation. All deliverables will be considered CUNY property, and vendors cannot retain personally identifiable information (PII). The project emphasizes compliance with accessibility standards (WCAG, Section 508), data security, and state procurement requirements. Proposals will be evaluated on technical expertise, relevant higher education and AI experience, ability to meet specifications, and overall value.


Required Skills

Generative AI solution design and deployment

Data preprocessing, model training, and integration

Higher education data management expertise

Accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1+, Section 508)

Chatbot UX/UI design for multi-device support

Secure development practices, PII handling restrictions

Experience with UAT facilitation and knowledge transfer

Strong project management and documentation skills

The Port of Olympia is seeking proposals from qualified web design and development firms to redesign its public-facing website, www.portolympia.com. The goal is to deliver a fully responsive, ADA-compliant, accessible, and user-centered website that reflects the Port’s mission and enhances engagement with community members, partners, and stakeholders. The redesigned site should simplify navigation, improve user experience, and cater to diverse audiences through inclusive design and multilingual capabilities.


The selected vendor will be responsible for the complete redevelopment process, including stakeholder interviews, user research, content audits, benchmarking, architecture redesign, wireframing, CMS setup, and implementation. Deliverables must also include content migration, SEO optimization, event calendar tools, multilingual support, and internal intranet access for up to 50 staff.


The CMS must be scalable and intuitive, enabling a small team (3–5 content editors) to manage and maintain content with minimal technical assistance. The system should offer robust permissions, editing workflows, and integration with analytics, security, and accessibility tools. Final deliverables include documentation, training, QA testing, and post-launch support.


The Port will evaluate proposals based on vendor experience, technical strategy, accessibility compliance, CMS capabilities, and total value. Implementation is expected to begin in October 2025, with project completion phased according to the vendor’s proposed schedule.

opportunity.title: RFP: Stephen F. Austin State University Website Design
opportunity.summary: SFA seeks a web design partner with Drupal expertise to redesign its website, develop flexible templates, and deliver a modern, accessible, and scalable platform.

Proposal Due Date: September 5, 2025 (5:00 PM CDT)

Sealed Bid Opening: September 8, 2025 (8:30 AM CDT)


Stephen F. Austin State University (SFA), a member of the University of Texas System, seeks proposals from qualified vendors to redesign its public-facing website. The project will deliver a modern, accessible, and brand-aligned platform that improves user experience and strengthens digital identity across the institution’s six colleges.


The selected partner must demonstrate proven expertise in Drupal development and higher education web strategy. Scope includes discovery and analysis of site architecture, analytics, and branding, plus competitive reviews of peer institutions. Deliverables include a UX strategy for prospective students, current students, faculty, staff, and other stakeholders, along with new design concepts and mockups for the homepage and key templates such as academic programs, department pages, and news.


The project requires a custom Drupal theme, reusable components, and development of the top 20 public-facing pages. The solution must integrate with systems like Slate, calendars, and news feeds while meeting WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards. Hosting and deployment will use SFA’s Rancher platform, with automated workflows and pipelines established for reliability. Additional tasks include analytics integration, Google Analytics reporting, staff training, and full documentation of all templates and components.


Optional services may include SEO audits, governance recommendations, content strategy, and user testing. Evaluation will weigh Drupal expertise, portfolio quality, methodology, team qualifications, cost, and references.

opportunity.title: RFP: Beaufort County – Website Update and Redesign
opportunity.summary: Beaufort County seeks a vendor to redesign its website with ADA compliance, modern CMS, AI-enhanced search, and integrations for agendas, meetings, and social media.
opportunity.description:
Deadline for Questions: September 11, 2025 (5:00 PM EST)

Proposal Due Date: October 2, 2025, 3:00 PM EST (via Procurement Portal)

Evaluation & Selection: October 2025

Contract Start: Upon award; initial term negotiable


Beaufort County, South Carolina, is seeking proposals from qualified firms to redesign and modernize its official website. The goal is to create a modern, responsive, and accessible online platform that enhances access to services, news, and resources. The new site must meet ADA/WCAG 2.1 standards, deliver a clean and intuitive experience, and allow for a scalable design that supports departmental sub-sites under a unified brand.


The site will be supported by a user-friendly content management system (CMS) enabling staff to manage content without technical expertise. Key features include role-based permissions, document/media management, reusable templates, scheduling, and integration with Active Directory/Microsoft Entra.


Preferred integrations include CivicPlus Agenda Management for meeting data, Granicus Swagit for video archives, and seamless social media. Other features include news and events modules, emergency alerts, directories, online forms, service requests, FAQs, multilingual support, and microsites.


The project also requires an AI-enhanced search engine capable of handling natural language queries, providing context-aware results, and utilizing secure cloud hosting with SSL/TLS encryption, patching, audit logging, and compliance with IT standards.


Proposals will be evaluated based on the requirements met, integration, implementation quality, experience, and cost. Vendors must provide insurance, references, and certify compliance with nondiscrimination and debarment rules.

opportunity.description:
Senior Analyst, Data & Analytics – Existing Client Work to Augment Existing Agency Team


Data & Analytics at Agency:

opportunity.title: eCommerce Graphic Designer-Luxury/Beauty/Fragrance-Contract
opportunity.summary: Need a senior e-commerce Graphic Designer with a high-end aesthetic and experience in high-end beauty, fragrance, or other luxury brands to create beautiful, experiential website/email images.
opportunity.description:
Senior E-Commerce Graphic Designer (Contract, Part-Time)

Luxury, High-End Beauty or Fragrance Experience


We are seeking a creative and experienced senior e-commerce Graphic Designer with a background in high-end beauty, fragrance, or other luxury brands. This part-time contractor role (10–15 hours per week) involves enhancing the visual presence across digital channels for a premium, distinctive e-commerce consumer packaged goods brand. The ideal candidate had a high aesthetic outlook and will interpret our brand’s position, vision, and strategic creative direction and think like a creative or art director to produce beautiful and experiential visuals (think a brand look and feel elevated, unique and experiential like Aesop, Le Labo, Amouage, Frederic Malle, or Diptyque) for a Shopify-based e-commerce site and email strategy.


This role offers the opportunity to further shape the visual direction of a luxury brand’s online presence. If you’re passionate about high-end design and ready to take ownership of incredible digital creative, we’d love to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities

  • Digital Asset Creation: Design visually compelling assets for Shopify-based e-commerce site, including one new homepage hero image, one collection banner, and nine product detail page (PDP) carousel images each month. Ensure all visuals reflect a luxurious, cohesive brand aesthetic that can draw consumers into an image and help them experience a product through a digital screen
  • Email Marketing Graphics: Create up to 20 engaging graphics per month for email campaigns, aligning each with brand campaigns and optimizing for engagement and conversion.
  • Brand-Driven Imagery: Leverage existing brand elements (logo, typography, color palette), high-quality photography, and carefully selected stock images (ensuring they blend seamlessly with our style) to maintain a premium look and feel. Incorporate AI-generated imagery when appropriate to enhance creativity, while keeping all visuals authentic, elevated and on-brand.
  • Strategic Creativity: Interpret the brand’s current market position and strategic creative direction to inform your designs. Proactively propose innovative concepts and creative ideas that elevate visual identity. Think like a creative director by pushing the luxury aesthetic forward with fresh design approaches.
  • Autonomy & Collaboration: Manage your workload independently within the 10–15 hours per week timeframe. Coordinate with marketing and product teams as needed to ensure all deliverables meet brand guidelines and support our business objectives.

Required Qualifications

  • Experience: Senior-level visual designer or art director/designer with extensive experience in e-commerce, preferably within luxury, high-end beauty and fragrance, or other premium lifestyle brands.
  • Technical Skills: Mastery of Adobe Creative Suite (especially Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and other design tools such as Figma.
  • E-commerce & Email Expertise: Deep understanding of e-commerce design best practices and Shopify platform requirements, as well as email marketing design standards. Demonstrated ability to create graphics optimized for web and email performance.
  • Creative Portfolio: Strong portfolio showcasing elevated, brand-aligned visuals. Proficiency in color theory, typography, and composition to evoke a high-end aesthetic.
  • Brand & Trend Awareness: Keen eye for luxury brand aesthetics and awareness of current design trends. Ability to adapt visual style to an evolving brand strategy and market landscape.
  • Work Style: Excellent communication skills and the ability to work independently managing time effectively and incorporating feedback.
  • Education (Preferred): Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Fine Arts, or a related field is a plus, though equivalent professional experience will also be considered.

opportunity.title: B2B Professional Services Rebrand & Positioning
opportunity.summary: We’re seeking a brand and positioning consultancy to lead a strategic rebrand for a B2B professional services agency operating in a highly saturated, look-alike market.
opportunity.description:
We’re seeking a brand and positioning consultancy to lead a strategic rebrand for a B2B professional services agency operating in a highly saturated, look-alike market.

This is not a cosmetic refresh. The mandate is to create clear, defensible differentiation in a category where most firms say the same things, use the same language, and tell the same stories.

The right partner understands how professional services firms actually grow and sell and has done this work from the inside, not just as an external brand exercise.

The Opportunity

The agency is at an inflection point. Their capabilities are strong, their work is credible, but their positioning does not clearly articulate:

  • Why they exist beyond generic expertise
  • What makes them meaningfully different from comparable firms
  • How buyers should understand their value in practical, outcome-driven terms
  • How their story should show up consistently across sales, marketing, and recruiting

We’re looking for a partner who can help define the firm’s strategic narrative, not just its visual identity.
